About The Initiative

Physics training, seminars, and mentorship for Bangladesh

ICTP PWF Physics For Bangladesh is an outreach program of Physics Without Frontiers at ICTP.

Program

ICTP PWF Physics For Bangladesh is an outreach program under Physics Without Frontiers at the International Centre for Theoretical Physics. It was launched by Prof. Nabil Iqbal and Ahmed Rakin Kamal to offer rigorous courses in physics and to help develop the physics scene in Bangladesh.

The program runs a yearly cycle of schools, seminars, and mentorship activities. The aim is to widen access to advanced material, connect students with researchers, and support a stronger long-term culture of physics learning and research.

Organizers

  • Nabil IqbalProfessor of Mathematical and Theoretical Physics at Durham University; Visiting Researcher at AMLab, University of Amsterdam
  • Mishaal HaiBRAC University
  • Sayeda Tashnuba JahanBRAC University
  • Ahmed Rakin KamalMasaryk University, Czech Republic and BRAC University
  • Onirban IslamPostdoctoral Researcher, Institute for Mathematics, University of Potsdam, Germany
  • Noshin Ferdous ShammaUniversity of Bologna

Student Volunteers

  • Kazi Fahim Reza ArkoBRAC University
  • Tahmid ShahriarBRAC University
  • Walid HasanBRAC University
  • Fahim HaqueBRAC University

Contact

For public inquiries, applications, and collaborations, email physicsforbangladesh@gmail.com.
